title: Tangy Creamy Croatian Olives Puff
description: A quick and easy keto-friendly dish featuring green olives and flaky lamination puff, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a medium bowl, mix together the cream cheese, garlic, parsley, feta cheese, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the center of the puff pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Add the green olives on top of the cream cheese mixture, leaving some space between each olive.
Fold the edges of the puff pastry over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the top of the puff pastry with a little bit of water and use a knife to make a few slashes in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake the puff in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the puff from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
